reasoning: The limiter of poor lactate clearance is evident from your recent ride and power curve analysis. Tackling over-unders close to race conditions will improve endurance and prepare you for the relentless nature of the Alpine Loop, especially the key segment from Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5x (6 min at 218W, 3 min at 242W) with 2 min recovery after each set

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
